raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/XXXX, I was charged a {$50.00} security deposit by XXXX XXXX XXXX in XXXX. The hotel claims that the deposit was refunded to my Citi Bank credit card ; however, the refund has not appeared on my statement. I have contacted both the hotel and Citi Bank multiple timesfive times by phone and many times via email with Citi Bank, and XXXX times with the hotelbut the issue remains unresolved.
